reason: Successfully verified that the agent can use the GitHub tool to retrieve the authenticated user's GitHub username after granting account access.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully, displayed Super Agent with agents list in sidebar.
Found and clicked the "QA-20260424-025830-gnd8" agent in the sidebar — Agent was selected and landing page displayed with message input.
Verified agent status is "idle" — Agent status indicator showed "idle" in both the main view and sidebar.
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message was typed into input and sent successfully. Agent status changed to "working".

Account access request card appeared asking to grant GitHub account access — Card displayed GitHub account as an option with checkbox already selected. Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant access.
API request review dialog appeared for GitHub API call — Dialog asked to allow "GET /user" request. Clicked "Allow" button.
Permission confirmation dialog appeared — Selected "Allow Once" option to proceed with one-time permission.
Waited for response — Agent completed processing in 38 seconds and returned to "idle" status.
Verified response includes GitHub username — Response displayed "Your GitHub username is yiw190." as shown in the screenshot.
